g.text: ## Cell Binary Format with Varint Key
Table B-tree Leaf Cell · Big-Endian · Variable Length

text.tspan: ## Cell Binary Format with Varint Key
Table B-tree Leaf Cell · Big-Endian · Variable Length

g.text: Concrete Example · rowid=300, payload=38 bytes, no overflow
0 varint (1–9) payload_size (byte count of record body)
+n+m+p 4 (conditional) overflow_page (u32 BE, only if payload overflows page)

text.tspan: 0 varint (1–9) payload_size (byte count of record body)
+n+m+p 4 (conditional) overflow_page (u32 BE, only if payload overflows page)

g.text: **Exception:** The 9th byte (if reached) uses all 8 bits — no continuation bit.

text.tspan: **Exception:** The 9th byte (if reached) uses all 8 bits — no continuation bit.

g.text: Step 1: 300 in binary = 1_0010_1100 (9 bits → needs 2 bytes)
Step 3: Encode MSB-first with continuation bits:

text.tspan: Step 1: 300 in binary = 1_0010_1100 (9 bits → needs 2 bytes)
Step 3: Encode MSB-first with continuation bits:

g.text: header_size includes itself size of each value is
and all serial_type varints determined by its serial_type

text.tspan: header_size includes itself size of each value is
and all serial_type varints determined by its serial_type

g.text: │ ... partial record payload (fits on this page) ... │
│ │ Points to first overflow page containing │ │
│ │ the remainder of the record payload. │ │
│ │ That page may chain to further overflow │ │
│ │ pages via its own 4-byte next-page pointer. │ │
- If payload ≤ (usable-12) * 64/255 - 23, then stored entirely on page.

text.tspan: │ ... partial record payload (fits on this page) ... │
│ │ Points to first overflow page containing │ │

│ │ That page may chain to further overflow │ │
│ │ pages via its own 4-byte next-page pointer. │ │
- If payload ≤ (usable-12) * 64/255 - 23, then stored entirely on page.

g.text: ### Column Values → Serial Types → Wire Bytes
Column 0: INTEGER 42 → serial_type = 4 (32-bit int) → 4 value bytes

text.tspan: ### Column Values → Serial Types → Wire Bytes
Column 0: INTEGER 42 → serial_type = 4 (32-bit int) → 4 value bytes
